## What changed

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

List the checks you ran, including `run_tests.ps1` when applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated files.
- [ ] Existing saved designs remain compatible or include a migration.
- [ ] README or changelog text was updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] No credentials, account data, or personal information are included.
